prompt_1:

Amsarka yakamata ta haɗa da duk abubuwan dogaro, kawunan aiki da sanarwar aikin don zama mai amfani kai tsaye (ko da ga waɗanda aka gani a cikin ɓangaren da aka bayar). BA yakamata ka kira ko gwada aikin kuma BA yakamata ka aiwatar da babban aiki a cikin amsarka. Yakamata ka aiwatar da aikin a cikin Python. Yakamata ka fitar da cikakken aiwatarwarka a cikin shingen lamba guda ɗaya da aka nannade da kullin uku.

```
